creator: daeron@Wit401305.student.utwente.nl
text:
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	/usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/
#	/usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/files
#	/usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/files/configure
#	/usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/files/md5
#	/usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/pkg
#	/usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/pkg/COMMENT
#	/usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/pkg/DESCR
#	/usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/pkg/PLIST
#	/usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/patches
#	/usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/patches/patch-aa
#	/usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/Makefile
#
echo c - /usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/
mkdir -p /usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/ > /dev/null 2>&1
echo c - /usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/files
mkdir -p /usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/files > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - /usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/files/configure
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/files/configure << 'END-of-/usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/files/configure'
X#!/bin/sh
X
X# WMSound configuration and compilation script
X# (C) Copyright 1998, Anthony Quinn & Pascal Hofstee
X# Modified for FreeBSD port installation by Glenn Johnson
X
XVERSION="0.9.0"
XDEVICE="/dev/dsp"
X
X(echo "{";\
Xecho "  SoundPath = (\"~/GNUstep/Library/WindowMaker/Sounds\",";\
Xecho "              \"/usr/X11R6/share/WindowMaker/Sounds\");";\
Xecho "  SoundSetsPath = (\"~/GNUstep/Library/WindowMaker/SoundSets\",";\
Xecho "              \"/usr/X11R6/share/WindowMaker/SoundSets\");";\
Xecho "  Device = $DEVICE;";\
Xecho "  AppExit = appexit.wav;";\
Xecho "  AppStart = appstart.wav;";\
Xecho "  Hide = hide.wav;";\
Xecho "  Iconify = iconify.wav;";\
Xecho "  Maximize = maximize.wav;";\
Xecho "  UnMaximize = unmaximize.wav;";\
Xecho "  Shade = shade.wav;";\
Xecho "  Startup = startup.wav;";\
Xecho "  UnHide = unhide.wav;";\
Xecho "  DeIconify = uniconify.wav;";\
Xecho "  UnShade = unshade.wav;";\
Xecho "  UserDefined = replaceme.wav;";\
Xecho "}";)
X
END-of-/usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/files/configure
echo x - /usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/files/md5
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/files/md5 << 'END-of-/usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/files/md5'
XMD5 (WSoundPrefs-0.9.1.tar.gz) = 309748ace94b9175663fa46daebbbbbf
END-of-/usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/files/md5
echo c - /usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/pkg
mkdir -p /usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/pkg > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - /usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/pkg/COMMENT
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/pkg/COMMENT << 'END-of-/usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/pkg/COMMENT'
XThe Configuration Utility for Window Maker's sound server.
END-of-/usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/pkg/COMMENT
echo x - /usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/pkg/DESCR
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/pkg/DESCR << 'END-of-/usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/pkg/DESCR'
XThis is a Configuration Utility for the WindowMaker SoundServer (WMSound).
XIt allows you to configure which sound to play on which soundevent .. and 
Xthe loading/saving of entire soundsets.
END-of-/usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/pkg/DESCR
echo x - /usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/pkg/PLIST
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/pkg/PLIST << 'END-of-/usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/pkg/PLIST'
XGNUstep/Apps/WSoundPrefs.app/WSoundPrefs
XGNUstep/Apps/WSoundPrefs.app/WSoundPrefs.xpm
XGNUstep/Apps/WSoundPrefs.app/WSoundPrefs.tiff
XGNUstep/Apps/WSoundPrefs.app/xpm/events.xpm
XGNUstep/Apps/WSoundPrefs.app/xpm/paths.xpm
XGNUstep/Apps/WSoundPrefs.app/xpm/loadset.xpm
XGNUstep/Apps/WSoundPrefs.app/xpm/saveset.xpm
XGNUstep/Apps/WSoundPrefs.app/tiff/events.tiff
XGNUstep/Apps/WSoundPrefs.app/tiff/paths.tiff
XGNUstep/Apps/WSoundPrefs.app/tiff/loadset.tiff
XGNUstep/Apps/WSoundPrefs.app/tiff/saveset.tiff
X@dirrm GNUstep/Apps/WSoundPrefs.app/xpm
X@dirrm GNUstep/Apps/WSoundPrefs.app/tiff
X@dirrm GNUstep/Apps/WSoundPrefs.app
END-of-/usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/pkg/PLIST
echo c - /usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/patches
mkdir -p /usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/patches > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - /usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/patches/patch-aa
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/patches/patch-aa << 'END-of-/usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/patches/patch-aa'
X--- Imakefile.orig	Tue Jan 19 09:57:56 1999
X+++ Imakefile	Tue Jan 19 09:58:05 1999
X@@ -1,8 +1,6 @@
X #define IHaveSubdirs
X #define PassCDebugFlags CDEBUGFLAGS="$(CDEBUGFLAGS)"
X 
X-PREFIX = /usr/local
X-
X XCOMM CDEBUGFLAGS = -Wall -ggdb -DDEBUG
X CDEBUGFLAGS = -O6 -m486 
X 
END-of-/usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/patches/patch-aa
echo x - /usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >/usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/Makefile << 'END-of-/usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:	WSoundPrefs
X# Version required:	0.9.1
X# Date created:		19 Jauary 1999
X# Whom:			daeron@shadowmere.student.utwente.nl
X#
X# $Id: Makefile,v 1.2 1999/01/18 06:42:59 asami Exp $
X#
X
XDISTNAME=	WSoundPrefs-0.9.1
XPKGNAME=    wsoundprefs-0.9.1
XCATEGORIES=	audio windowmaker
XMASTER_SITES=	ftp://shadowmere.student.utwente.nl/pub/WindowMaker/
X
XMAINTAINER= daeron@shadowmere.student.utwente.nl
X
XBUILD_DEPENDS=	wmaker:${PORTSDIR}/x11-wm/windowmaker
XBUILD_DEPENDS=  wmsound:${PORTSDIR}/audio/wmsound
X
XFETCH_BEFORE_ARGS=	-b
X
XUSE_IMAKE=	yes
XNO_INSTALL_MANPAGES=	yes
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-/usr/ports/audio/wsoundprefs/Makefile
exit
